query:
INSERT INTO tasks (
      id,
      task_status,
      task_type,
      model_type,
      provider,
      provider_job_id,
      queue_status_url,
      queue_response_url,
      prompt_token,
      frontend_caller,
      frontend_subscriber_id,
      frontend_subscriber_payload
    )
    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
